title: Direttiva mill-Prim Ministru u Ministru tal-Finanzi għall-Ħruġ ta’ ammont ta’ €39,599,347.78 5.1% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2014 (It-Tielet Ħruġ) Imħassra bl-Att XLV tal-2016
title_en: Direttiva mill-Prim Ministru u Ministru tal-Finanzi għall-Ħruġ ta’ ammont ta’ €39,599,347.78 5.1% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2014 (It-Tielet Ħruġ) Imħassra bl-Att XLV tal-2016
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/469.4/mlt, expression eli/sl/469.4/20120503/mlt).

provisions.title: LEGAL NOTICE 374 of 2004, as amended by Legal Notice 427 of 2007
provisions.content:
The title of this Directive is Directive by the Prime
Minister and Minister of Finance for the Issue of €39,599,347.78

provisions.title: LEGAL NOTICE 374 of 2004, as amended by Legal Notice 427 of 2007
LEGAL NOTICE 374 of 2004, as amended by Legal Notice 427 of 2007
provisions.content: This Stock shall be issued as set out in the prospectus.

provisions.title: This Stock shall be issued as set out in the prospectus
provisions.content:
All persons and/or entities are eligible to apply for this
Stock. Allotment will be applied as set out in the prospectus.

provisions.title: This Stock shall be issued as set out in the prospectus
provisions.content:
(a) In terms of the Financial Markets Act, when the Stock
has been allotted, an application shall be made for the
Stock to be placed on the official list and for trading on
the Malta Stock Exchange.

Title.
Amended by:
L.N. 427 of 2007.
Mode of issuing
stock.
Allotment policy.
Trading on the
Malta Stock
Exchange.

(b) On the 6th January, 2005 after the payment of the first
dividend, this stock will be integrated with the existing
issue 5.1% Malta Government Stock 2014 (III) and
shall thereafter both be deemed to be one Stock.

provisions.title: Exchange
provisions.content:
Interest at the rate of €2.55,0 for every €100 Stock will be
payable half-yearly in arrear on the 6th day of January and on the
6th day of July in every year for the duration of the Stock. The first
pro-rata payment covering the period from the 14th day of August,
2004 to the 6th day of January, 2005 shall be made on the 6th day
of January, 2005.

Rate of interest and
dates of payment.
Amended by:
L.N. 427 of 2007.

provisions.title: L.N. 427 of 2007
provisions.content:
*

The Stock shall be redeemed at par on the 6th July, 2014.

This Directive has been revoked by Act XLV of 2016, but it is still partially
applicable since the six-year period prescribed by law to claim funds referring to
stocks that have already matured, has not yet expired.

Redemption of
Stock.
